summary: Successfully completed comprehensive testing of new authentication system and landing page features for REDACTED app. All backend APIs working perfectly (13/13 tests passed). Frontend authentication and landing page features working excellently with only minor UX improvements needed.

ui_bugs.issue: Error messages for invalid login credentials not displaying to user

integration_issues.issue: Typewriter animation content not consistently visible during automated testing

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section 'WHAT ARE THEY HIDING?'
Landing page navigation has Login and Get Started buttons
How It Works section shows 3 steps (01, 02, 03)
Platform previews section shows Twitter, Facebook, Instagram mockups with MKUltra content
Final CTA section with 'Create Your Free Account' button
GET ACCESS button navigates to /auth page
Auth page loads with Google OAuth button and email/password form
Auth toggle between Sign In and Create Account works
Registration flow: creates user, returns JWT, redirects to dashboard
Dashboard shows user name and logout button when logged in
Logout clears session and returns to auth page
Login with valid test@test.com credentials works
Invalid login credentials correctly rejected (401)
Dashboard protection: visiting /dashboard without auth redirects to /auth
Back to base link navigates from auth to landing page
Google OAuth button exists with correct text and icon
All navigation buttons work (Login, Get Started, Final CTA)
POST /api/auth/register creates user and returns JWT token
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns JWT token
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns user data
GET /api/auth/me without token returns 401
All existing document processing APIs still working (analyze, generate posts, history)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (13/13 API endpoints working including 6/6 new auth endpoints)

action_item_for_main_agent: Minor improvements: 1) Add error message display for invalid login attempts on frontend, 2) Verify typewriter animation timing/visibility
